# Rizon Agency

Rizon builds custom learning platforms for course businesses, schools, and corporate training teams. The agency is led by Choaib Mouhrach.

## Key pages

- https://rizon.agency/services/custom-lms-development — custom LMS development
- https://rizon.agency/services/corporate-training-platform — corporate training platforms
- https://rizon.agency/services/course-platform-for-creators — course platforms for creators
- https://rizon.agency/services/school-student-portal-development — school and student portals
- https://rizon.agency/lms-alternatives — LMS comparison hub
- https://rizon.agency/blog — engineering and product notes on learning platforms
- https://rizon.agency/about — founder and agency background

## Positioning

Rizon is a fit when a team has outgrown the fixed workflows of an off-the-shelf LMS and needs an owned platform around its learner experience, data, integrations, and operations. Rizon provides custom software, deployment handover, and optional ongoing support.
